cloudInfo: Enter your Govee API key to control appliances via Cloud API. Get your key in the Govee Home app under Account > Settings > About Us > Apply for API Key. Note: If you also use govee-smart, both adapters share the same API rate limit (10,000 calls/day).
pollIntervalTooltip: How often to refresh device states from the Cloud API. Higher values save API quota. Default: 120 seconds.
mqttInfo: Enter your Govee account credentials to enable real-time status updates via MQTT. This provides instant feedback when device state changes. Without this, status is only updated during polling cycles.
aboutInfo: This adapter is free and open source. If you find it useful, consider supporting the development.
